name: Donate Cat Food
shortDescription: Donate ONE 15kg bag of cat food (KSh 3000/-). For every bag you donate, WE WILL MATCH YOUR DONATION . We'll deliver your donation directly to your chosen recipient (KSPCA (Diani, Nairobi, Naivasha, Mombasa), TNR Trust, Mici Randagai Watamu, Lamu Animal Welfare Clinic, Footsteps Rescue Centre, Cat Lovers Kenya, Nairobi Feline Sanctuary) on your behalf.
description: k For every bag you donate, WE WILL MATCH YOUR DONATION.   OUR PARTNER ANIMAL SHELTERS AND ADVOCATES: The KSPCA (Kenya Society for the Protection and Care of Animals) - a welfare charity that protects animals from neglect and abuse. We currently support their branches in Diani , Nairobi , Naivasha and Mombasa . TNR Trust - their aim is to enhance community health by managing a healthy pet population by means of neutering and rabies campaigns. MICI Randagai Watamu - a non-profit organisation that feeds, shelters and advocates for street cats in Watamu. The Lamu Animal Welfare Clinic - a charitable Trust dedicated to alleviating the suffering of distressed animals, provide treatment, vaccinate, de-worm and manage the Lamu cats' population. Footsteps Rescue Centre (Diani) - a sanctuary for street animals in Diani Cat Lovers Kenya - an organisation that helps home abandoned cats and supports cat-foster-families Nairobi Feline Sanctuary - an organisation that provides a forever home for rescued cats and an education centre for animal welfare and activism
